tasks.subject: Task 0: 创建教程目录和写作模板
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 准备好 21 个文件的占位 + 统一的写作模板

**Files:**
- Create: youtube_scripts/build-from-scratch/README.md
- Create: docs/superpowers/plans/build-paiai-helper.md

**Verify:** ls youtube_scripts/build-from-scratch/ && cat docs/superpowers/plans/build-paiai-helper.md

**Steps:** mkdir -p → 写 README 占位 → 写写作模板 → commit

```json:metadata
{"files": ["youtube_scripts/build-from-scratch/README.md", "docs/superpowers/plans/build-paiai-helper.md"], "verifyCommand": "ls youtube_scripts/build-from-scratch/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["目录存在", "README 占位", "写作模板"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: 写 bfs-01-spring-boot-skeleton.md
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 写完第 1 集，让读者能 mvn spring-boot:run 起来

**Files:**
- Create: youtube_scripts/build-from-scratch/bfs-01-spring-boot-skeleton.md

**Acceptance Criteria:** ≥ 500 行；7 段结构；完整 pom.xml (groupId=charles, artifactId=easyrag, Java 17, Spring Boot 3.4.2)；主启动类 charles.easyrag.EasyRagApplication；三 profile；**全文所有 Java 代码用 package charles.easyrag，不用 com.yizhaoqi.smartpai**；验证命令可跑；≥ 3 常见坑；下集预告

**Verify:** wc -l 至少 500 行，grep '^## ' 至少 6 个；grep 全文无 com.yizhaoqi.smartpai

```json:metadata
{"files": ["youtube_scripts/build-from-scratch/bfs-01-spring-boot-skeleton.md"], "verifyCommand": "wc -l && ! grep -q 'com.yizhaoqi.smartpai' youtube_scripts/build-from-scratch/bfs-01-spring-boot-skeleton.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["≥ 500 行", "7 段", "完整 pom (charles.easyrag)", "验证可跑", "≥ 3 常见坑", "全文用 charles.easyrag"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```
